title: nivenia zahlbruckneri
intro: Nivenia zahlbruckneri, also known as the White Nivenia or White Nivenia Iris, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Nivenia zahlbruckneri typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots and leaves, which can be used to make teas or applied topically as a poultice.
